completed_slice.action: Add a deterministic hostname-resolution evidence ladder so control-plane hostname discovery cannot be reported as a resolving, reachable, identity-verified, exact-commit deployment.

next_acceptance: canonical hostname observed through sanitized Cloudflare project metadata
